leadershipRequirements: Technical lead experience throughout full project development lifecycle
Squad-based collaboration with product managers and designers
softSkills: Empathy for mission and company values
summary: ANDPAD is seeking a Golang Engineer with 5+ years of experience to join their SaaS platform serving the construction industry. The role involves designing and implementing product features, refactoring for microservices, and leading technical architecture decisions. The ideal candidate will have strong AWS and gRPC expertise, experience with database schema design (RDBMS and KVS), and ability to work in cross-functional squads. The company offers hybrid work, competitive benefits including 18 days leave, premium healthcare, and annual performance reviews twice yearly.

prioritySignals.signal: 5+ years Golang with AWS and gRPC experience
prioritySignals.reason: Explicitly required technical foundation; forms the core of the role and is non-negotiable for the position

prioritySignals.signal: Technical lead experience throughout full project lifecycle
prioritySignals.reason: Demonstrates ability to drive architecture decisions and lead development from conception to operation
Company is actively refactoring products for microservices; Docker/Kubernetes experience is highly valued

prioritySignals.signal: Schema design for RDBMS and KVS
prioritySignals.reason: Critical for database optimization; Aurora MySQL, Elasticsearch, and DynamoDB are in their tech stack
Part of their development environment with explicit IaC tools listed
International environment mentioned; business-level English is required for cross-team collaboration
Supports production operations and quality improvement initiatives
Nice-to-have differentiator showing technical passion and external visibility
Explicit requirement for building secure web services
